title: vicia pyrenaica
intro: Vicia pyrenaica, also known as the Pyrenean vetch or Pyrenean broom vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, Vicia pyrenaica has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of diabetes. In herbal preparations, Vicia pyrenaica can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
